data.body: FORCE_CLAIM: plan-review gate bypassed by user approval — no plan-review attestation was verified. Reason: "Plan-review verdict INDETERMINATE due to verify sub-stage not firing (verify_requests=0 across 3 runs) — an infra fault, not a plan defect. DET floor P1-P9 all PASS, 0 blocking findings. The indeterminate findings are the unverifiable-external-CLI class (mcp-publisher login github-oidc / OIDC namespace auth); independently verified: 'mcp-publisher login --help' lists github-oidc, and the job matches the canonical modelcontextprotocol.io/registry/github-actions recipe. User directed landing this change.".
